untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of Divergence Index (DI) as the difference between 10-day and 40-day moving averages, followed by dynamic band calculation using standard deviation of the DI over a 40-day period. The allowed indicator list does not include a pre-computed DI indicator or the ability to calculate standard deviation of a derived metric. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameter is also undefined in the source material. Translatable approximation provided using simple MA crossover as proxy for divergence direction, but this does not capture the band-based reversion logic.
translation_notes: Signal cannot be fully translated due to missing Divergence Index and dynamic band indicators. The approximation uses sma_10 crossing sma_40 as a proxy for when the fast average diverges from slow average, but does not implement the ±[THRESHOLD_NEEDED] × StDev(DI, 40) band logic or reversion entry conditions. Exit conditions defaulted to reversal of entry (crossover in opposite direction) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Manual implementation of DI and band calculation required for accurate backtesting.
